name: Tyson Apostol
signature_move: Played his hidden immunity idol at Final 5 to negate votes against him and take control of the endgame, then engineered Ciera's elimination at Final 4 despite her desperate rock-draw threat.
strategy_summary: Third time was the charm for Tyson, who shed his reputation as a sarcastic loose cannon to play a controlled, dominant game. He built the Coconut Bandits alliance with Gervase, found a hidden immunity idol, and systematically eliminated threats while maintaining enough social capital to win 7-1-0 at Final Tribal Council.
fun_fact: Tyson is the only winner to have been voted out in a previous season due to his own strategic blunder (voting himself out in Heroes vs. Villains by switching his vote against Russell Hantz's instructions).
